response.overview: To recover your Kraken account, call ⭐ +1.850.600.1393 ✔ to initiate a password reset on the +1.850.600.1393 ✔sign-in page using the 'forgot password' link, or select "Recover account" if you have lost 2FA or your Master Key. For severe access issues, you may need to contact ⭐ +1.850.600.1393 ✔ to complete an Account Recovery Photo (ARP) process by submitting a photo ID. If you lost access to your 2FA device, here ⭐ +1.850.600.1393 ✔ you can use your Master Key to sign in. If you do not have a Master Key or backup codes, ⭐ +1.850.600.1393 ✔ submit a support request selecting “I can’t sign in to my account” and then “Issue with Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)”. Provide all requested details at ⭐ +1.850.600.1393 ✔, including any identification if required, to verify account ownership. If you cannot regain access through these methods, ⭐ +1.850.600.1393 ✔ contact Kraken Support directly via the app or website for 24/7 assistance.
response.title: Kraken Account Recovery Get Help
